title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Backend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
